SEARCH
Package io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.itemstack

Record Class BannerBuilder

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Record
io.github.lucfr1746.llibrary.itemstack.BannerBuilder
Record Components:
banner - the ItemStack representing the banner that will have its patterns modified. Must not be null and should be a valid banner item with BannerMeta.
public record BannerBuilder(@NotNull org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack banner) extends Record
A utility class for building and manipulating banner ItemStacks in Minecraft. This class provides a fluent API to modify banner patterns and metadata.

The BannerBuilder ensures that the provided ItemStack is a valid banner and clones it to maintain immutability of the original ItemStack. This allows users to safely manipulate banners using this class.

  • Constructor Details

    • BannerBuilder

      public BannerBuilder(org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack banner)
      Constructs a new BannerBuilder from the specified banner ItemStack.

      The provided ItemStack must be a valid banner with BannerMeta. The original item is cloned to maintain immutability.

      Parameters:
      banner - the banner ItemStack. Must not be null and must have BannerMeta.
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if banner is null.
      IllegalArgumentException - if banner is Material.AIR.
      IllegalStateException - if banner does not have BannerMeta.

  • Method Details

    • addPattern

      public BannerBuilder addPattern(@NotNull @NotNull org.bukkit.block.banner.Pattern pattern)
      Adds a pattern to the banner.
      Parameters:
      pattern - the Pattern to add. Must not be null.
      Returns:
      the updated BannerBuilder instance.
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if pattern is null.

    • addPattern

      public BannerBuilder addPattern(@NotNull @NotNull org.bukkit.DyeColor dyeColor, @NotNull @NotNull org.bukkit.block.banner.PatternType patternType)
      Adds a pattern to the banner using the specified DyeColor and PatternType.
      Parameters:
      dyeColor - the color of the pattern. Must not be null.
      patternType - the type of the pattern. Must not be null.
      Returns:
      the updated BannerBuilder instance.
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if dyeColor or patternType is null.

    • build

      public org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack build()
      Builds and returns the modified ItemStack.
      Returns:
      the modified ItemStack.

    • changePatternColor

      public BannerBuilder changePatternColor(int index, @NotNull @NotNull org.bukkit.DyeColor dyeColor)
      Changes the color of an existing pattern at the specified index.
      Parameters:
      index - the index of the pattern to change. Must be valid.
      dyeColor - the new color. Must not be null.
      Returns:
      the updated BannerBuilder instance.
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if dyeColor is null.
      IndexOutOfBoundsException - if index is out of bounds.

    • changePatternType

      public BannerBuilder changePatternType(int index, @NotNull @NotNull org.bukkit.block.banner.PatternType patternType)
      Changes the type of existing pattern at the specified index.
      Parameters:
      index - the index of the pattern to change. Must be valid.
      patternType - the new pattern type. Must not be null.
      Returns:
      the updated BannerBuilder instance.
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if patternType is null.
      IndexOutOfBoundsException - if index is out of bounds.

    • clearPatterns

      public BannerBuilder clearPatterns()
      Removes all patterns from the banner.
      Returns:
      the updated BannerBuilder instance.

    • getPattern

      public Optional<org.bukkit.block.banner.Pattern> getPattern(int index)
      Retrieves a pattern by index.
      Parameters:
      index - the index of the pattern.
      Returns:
      an Optional containing the pattern if it exists, otherwise an empty Optional.

    • getPatterns

      public List<org.bukkit.block.banner.Pattern> getPatterns()
      Retrieves all patterns on the banner.
      Returns:
      a list of Patterns.

    • removePattern

      public BannerBuilder removePattern(int index)
      Removes a pattern at the specified index.
      Parameters:
      index - the index of the pattern to remove. Must be valid.
      Returns:
      the updated BannerBuilder instance.
      Throws:
      IndexOutOfBoundsException - if index is out of bounds.

    • removePatterns

      public BannerBuilder removePatterns(int... ids)
      Remove multiple patterns at the specified index.
      Parameters:
      ids - the index of the pattern to remove. Must be valid.
      Returns:
      the updated BannerBuilder instance.
      Throws:
      IndexOutOfBoundsException - if index is out of bounds.

    • setPattern

      public BannerBuilder setPattern(int index, @NotNull @NotNull org.bukkit.block.banner.Pattern pattern)
      Sets a pattern at the specified index.
      Parameters:
      index - the index of the pattern to set. Must be valid.
      pattern - the Pattern to set. Must not be null.
      Returns:
      the updated BannerBuilder instance.
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if pattern is null.
      IndexOutOfBoundsException - if index is out of bounds.

    • setPattern

      public BannerBuilder setPattern(int index, @NotNull @NotNull org.bukkit.DyeColor dyeColor, @NotNull @NotNull org.bukkit.block.banner.PatternType patternType)
      Sets a pattern at the specified index using the given DyeColor and PatternType.
      Parameters:
      index - the index of the pattern to set. Must be valid.
      dyeColor - the color of the pattern. Must not be null.
      patternType - the type of the pattern. Must not be null.
      Returns:
      the updated BannerBuilder instance.
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if dyeColor or patternType is null.
      IndexOutOfBoundsException - if index is out of bounds.

    • setPatterns

      public BannerBuilder setPatterns(@NotNull @NotNull List<org.bukkit.block.banner.Pattern> patterns)
      Replaces all patterns on the banner.
      Parameters:
      patterns - the list of Patterns to set. Must not be null.
      Returns:
      the updated BannerBuilder instance.
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if patterns is null.

    • getNumberOfPatterns

      public int getNumberOfPatterns()
      Retrieves the number of patterns on the banner.
      Returns:
      the number of patterns.

    • toItemBuilder

      public ItemBuilder toItemBuilder()
      Converts the BannerBuilder to an ItemBuilder.
      Returns:
      an ItemBuilder initialized with the current banner.

    • toString

      public final String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this record class. The representation contains the name of the class, followed by the name and value of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      toString in class Record
      Returns:
      a string representation of this object

    • hashCode

      public final int hashCode()
      Returns a hash code value for this object. The value is derived from the hash code of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      hashCode in class Record
      Returns:
      a hash code value for this object

    • equals

      public final boolean equals(Object o)
      Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one. The objects are equal if the other object is of the same class and if all the record components are equal. All components in this record class are compared with Objects::equals(Object,Object).
      Specified by:
      equals in class Record
      Parameters:
      o - the object with which to compare
      Returns:
      true if this object is the same as the o argument; false otherwise.

    • banner

      @NotNull public @NotNull org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack banner()
      Returns the value of the banner record component.
      Returns:
      the value of the banner record component
